summary: The Graffiticode forms language — compiles a description of a web form (fields, validation, theming, submit affordance) into a hosted, single-page form whose submissions can be delivered to a bound webhook.
in_scope: Single-page forms with an ordered list of fields
Field types: text, email, number, tel, url, textarea, select, radio, checkbox, date
Per-field config: label, name, placeholder, help, required
Validation: min / max (number, date), minLength / maxLength, pattern (regex), required
Submit affordance: button label, post-submit thank-you message or redirect URL
Webhook binding supplied as structured config (config.webhook), never inferred from prose
out_of_scope: Multi-page or branching/conditional forms and conditional fields
File uploads, payments, e-signatures, calculated fields
Email notifications (delivery is via the bound webhook)
Tabular input or grading (use L0166); charts (use L0173); reshaping collected submissions (use L0170)
Arbitrary custom rendering beyond the supported field types
